name: Amazing Trio
description_html: Three grasses are the charm of our organic Amazing Trio powder - a combination of three celebrity-status, whole leaf grasses – wheat, barley, and alfalfa. Blend it up in your favorite smoothie to sprout something that’s delicious and contains a good source of vitamin A, vitamin K, and iron! That’s a recipe for helping you feel amazing every day!*

name: Organic Super Greens Powder
description_html:
The package has changed, but all amazing greens remain the same! Our Organic Super Greens Powder takes boring smoothies from basic to extra with one incredible scoop. Blended splendidly with wheat grass and kale from U.S. family farms alongside moringa and spirulina, it’s a convenient way to round out your green wellness routine. 
Simply add it to any smoothie you like for an excellent source of vitamin K with no added sweeteners, colors, or flavors – just brilliant, nutritious greens that help you feel amazing every day.

  • SIMPLY AMAZING GREENS A blend of wheat grass, kale, moringa, spirulina, and nothing else
  • VITAMIN SUPPORT An easy way to add an excellent source of vitamin K to your day
  • SUPER INGREDIENTS Organic, vegan, and gluten free
  • HOME GROWN Wheat grass and kale from U.S. family farms
  • CONVENIENT POWDER Just scoop, stir & blend into your favorite smoothie recipe
  • FEEL AMAZING Feel amazing every day.*

name: Organic Wheat Grass Powder
description_html:
Our Organic Wheat Grass Powder has a new look, but the green goodness inside is everything you know and love! Made from organic, non-GMO whole-leaf wheat grass harvested at peak nutrition, it’s a convenient way to add something extra to your day! Each nutritious scoop provides your body with the whole food nutrition it needs to help you feel amazing every day – including an excellent source of vitamin K (142mcg), and iron (3.3mg), plus 3g of fiber!
 
Just mix one scoop to 8-12 fl oz or more of water, juice or smoothie to boost your green nutrition routine!


  • A SOURCE YOU TRUST Our whole-leaf wheat grass is field grown on U.S. family farms
  • CONVENIENT POWDER Easily add organic wheat grass to your water, juice, or smoothie
  • INGREDIENTS YOU FEEL AMAZING ABOUT Organic, vegan, non-GMO, kosher, gluten-free, and no added sugar
  • NUTRITION FROM PLANTS Excellent source of vitamin K (142mcg), and iron (3.3mg), plus 3g of fiber!

Commuters, students, busy-moms, yoga masters, and travelers alike appreciate our shaker's no-fuss design and ease of use. Fill it up, shake it, and go!

Super Greens just got extra... extra protein!
